summary: Implemented Phase 1 faction identity contract. Added canonical default faction `steel_vanguard`, carried faction identity through `PlayerInit`, sim `PlayerState`, start payload `PlayerStart`, lobby rows, replay branch seats/staging, client `GameState`, replay artifact schema version 2, docs, lifecycle matrix, and the phase status marker.
verification: cargo test --manifest-path server/Cargo.toml -p rts-sim game::replay::tests::replay_artifact: passed
cargo test --manifest-path server/Cargo.toml -p rts-protocol branch_staging_serializes_contract_shape: passed
RTS_ADDR=127.0.0.1:18081 cargo run --manifest-path server/Cargo.toml: not runnable in sandbox; bind failed with Operation not permitted
gameplay_impact: No intended gameplay change. Normal starts still use the current faction, starting City Centre/workers, Steel/Oil/Supply values, and existing command behavior; faction identity is now explicit for later faction catalog work.
next_executor_notes: Phase 2 should attach faction-aware catalog lookups to `PlayerState.faction_id` / `PlayerInit.faction_id`. Wire/start/lobby/branch fields use camelCase `factionId`; replay artifact players use the existing Rust `PlayerInit` snake_case field `faction_id`. Replay artifact schema is now version 2 and schema 1 artifacts without faction identity are intentionally rejected. Starting steel/oil and `starting_loadout_mode` remain replay/loadout shims for Phase 5.
manual_test_notes: Run a normal local match outside this sandbox and verify lobby/start still show current behavior: City Centre, four Workers, visible resources/minimap resource starts, command card, training, gathering, spectator start payload, and post-match replay startup.
